content:
FINAL BLOCK — COMPLETE DEPLOYMENT PIPELINE

Complete the remaining deployment blocker.

TASKS

1. Verify GitHub repository secrets.
2. Verify RENDER_API_KEY exists.
3. Verify RENDER_SERVICE_ID exists.
4. If missing, configure the GitHub Actions workflow to use them.
5. Test manual deployment from GitHub Actions.
6. Confirm Render receives the webhook.
7. Confirm deployment completes successfully.
8. Verify /health returns HTTP 200.
9. Verify /version commit equals GitHub HEAD.
10. Verify Android production.
11. Verify iOS production.
12. Verify Owner Chat.
13. Verify IVX IA replies.
14. Verify Members sync.
15. Verify Landing page.
16. Verify Admin modules.
17. Verify no placeholders remain.
18. Verify no stale deployment exists.
19. Produce deployment evidence only.

FINAL REPORT

TASK_ID:
STATE:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_SERVICE:
GITHUB_ACTION_STATUS:
RENDER_WEBHOOK_STATUS:
HEALTH_STATUS:
VERSION_STATUS:
ANDROID_STATUS:
IOS_STATUS:
CHAT_STATUS:
MEMBERS_STATUS:
LANDING_STATUS:
ADMIN_STATUS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Only return VERIFIED when every item above has been tested and proven with live evidence.
If any item cannot be verified, return FAILED and include the exact reason.
